source_title: Tehran domestic airport hit by Israeli bombs (video)
source_body: The Iran-Israel conflict intensified as Israel carried out heavy airstrikes on Tehran's Mehrabad Airport Friday night. Several aircraft were destroyed and thick smoke engulfed the facility. Earlier, on March 4, Israel had targeted defense systems at the same site. Reports indicate that U.S.-Israel attacks have so far claimed around 1,332 lives in Iran, deepening the crisis.
target_title: Israel Hits Tehran Airport as Smoke Engulfs Mehrabad
target_body: Israeli airstrikes hit Tehran's Mehrabad Airport on Friday night, damaging aircraft and sending thick smoke over the site. The strike follows an earlier attack on the airport's defense systems. The widening Iran-Israel conflict is now adding to a mounting civilian toll inside Iran.

source_title: Netflix to open office in Hyderabad
source_body: Netflix is set to establish a new office in Hyderabad, marking its second facility in India after Mumbai. The 30,000 sq ft centre will be inaugurated on March 12 by CM Revanth Reddy. The hub will focus on animation, visual effects and digital content production, and is expected to boost the AVGC sector while creating new job opportunities for skilled youth.
target_title: Netflix Picks Hyderabad for New India Content Hub
target_body: Netflix is opening a new office in Hyderabad as its second facility in India after Mumbai. The 30,000 sq ft centre will focus on animation, visual effects and digital production. The move is expected to strengthen the city's AVGC ecosystem and create skilled jobs.

source_body: Actor Allu Sirish married entrepreneur Nayanika Reddy in Hyderabad on March 6. The private ceremony drew big names like CM Revanth Reddy, Chiranjeevi, and Ram Charan. Notably, the date matches the 15th anniversary of Sirish's brother, Allu Arjun. The star-studded event featured traditional rituals, ivory outfits, and a blend of film and political elites.
target_title: Allu Sirish Marries Nayanika in Star-Studded Ceremony
target_body: Actor Allu Sirish married entrepreneur Nayanika Reddy in a private ceremony in Hyderabad on March 6. The wedding drew film personalities and political guests, including CM Revanth Reddy, Chiranjeevi and Ram Charan. Traditional rituals and a tightly guarded guest list marked the event.

source_title: AP & Karnataka Ban Social Media for Kids!
source_body: Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka are set to become the first Indian states to ban social media for minors. Chief Minister Naidu announced a 90-day deadline to restrict access for kids under 13 in AP. Meanwhile, Karnataka's Siddaramaiah proposed a stricter ban for those under 16 in the state budget. The move aims to curb digital addiction and mental health risks.
target_title: AP, Karnataka Move to Curb Social Media Access for Kids
target_body: Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka are moving to restrict social media access for minors, citing rising digital addiction and mental health concerns. AP has proposed limits for children under 13 within 90 days, while Karnataka is considering a stricter age threshold. The move could trigger a wider policy debate across India.

source_body: The Andhra Pradesh police have launched 'Operation Vajra Prahar' to eliminate narcotics. EAGLE IG A.K. Ravikrishna announced cordon searches across 100 locations, identifying 849 ganja supply hotspots. The mission aims to make AP a ganja-free state by dismantling illegal trafficking networks. Habitual offenders will face strict detention under the PIT NDPS Act.
target_title: AP Police Launch Statewide Anti-Narcotics Drive
target_body: Andhra Pradesh police have launched Operation Vajra Prahar to crack down on narcotics networks across the state. Officials say 849 ganja supply hotspots have been identified and searches are underway at 100 locations. Repeat offenders could face strict detention under the PIT NDPS Act.

source_title: Gold prices surge sharply in Hyderabad
source_body: Gold prices rose sharply in Hyderabad on Saturday, with 24-carat gold jumping by Rs 2,510 to Rs 1,63,640 per 10 grams. The price of 22-carat gold increased by Rs 2,300 to reach Rs 1,50,000 per 10 grams. Meanwhile, silver is currently priced at around Rs 1,04,000 per kg. Analysts say fluctuations in global markets continue to influence domestic gold and silver rates.
target_title: Gold Jumps in Hyderabad as Global Market Swings Bite
target_body: Gold prices rose sharply in Hyderabad on Saturday, with 24-carat rates climbing by Rs 2,510 per 10 grams and 22-carat gold also seeing a steep jump. Silver remained near Rs 1.04 lakh per kg. Analysts say global market volatility is continuing to push domestic bullion prices higher.

source_title: Team India swaps hotels for better luck in the final !
source_body: The BCCI has changed Team India's hotel before the T20 World Cup final in Ahmedabad. To avoid bad luck, the board picked a new stay instead of the hotel used during the 2023 ODI loss. Officials hope this move brings better results against New Zealand this Sunday. Fans are now waiting to see if changing rooms will finally lead to a big trophy win for India.
target_title: Team India Changes Hotel Ahead of T20 Final in Ahmedabad
target_body: Team India has shifted hotels ahead of the T20 World Cup final in Ahmedabad, with officials hoping for a fresh start before the title clash. The move comes with memories of the 2023 ODI final still lingering. Fans now wait to see whether the superstition brings India better luck this time.

source_title: Earthquakes & War: Iran on the Edge!
source_body: Iran is reeling as a 4.1-magnitude earthquake struck west of Bandar Abbas this Saturday. The USGS reported the tremor's depth at 10 km, marking the second quake in days. These natural disasters hit as military tensions with Israel and the U.S. reach a boiling point. Locals now face a double crisis, trapped between tectonic shifts and the looming threat of war.
target_title: Iran Faces Quake Shock as War Tensions Keep Rising
target_body: A 4.1-magnitude earthquake struck west of Bandar Abbas on Saturday, adding to the pressure on an already tense Iran. The tremor came just days after another quake and amid escalating military tensions involving Israel and the U.S. The overlap of natural and geopolitical shocks is deepening public anxiety.

source_title: UK peers demand AI halt to protect creative rights
source_body: UK peers are urging ministers to halt plans that would let AI firms use copyrighted creative work without consent. Critics say the proposal could damage artists, publishers and the wider creative economy. The clash is sharpening the debate over how to regulate AI while protecting intellectual property.
target_title: UK Peers Push AI Curbs to Protect Creative Rights
target_body: UK peers are pressing ministers to halt plans that would let AI firms use creative work without consent. Critics say the proposal could hurt artists, publishers and the wider creative economy. The row is intensifying the debate over AI regulation and intellectual property.

source_title: Wildlife Trusts restore Norfolk land for ecology
source_body: The Wildlife Trusts are converting farmland in Norfolk into woodland habitat as part of a major restoration push. The project aims to boost biodiversity, strengthen local ecosystems and mark the group's centenary with a visible conservation effort.
target_title: Wildlife Trusts Turn Norfolk Land Into New Habitat
target_body: The Wildlife Trusts are restoring farmland in Norfolk into woodland habitat as part of a major conservation push. The project is aimed at boosting biodiversity and rebuilding damaged ecosystems. The move also marks the group's centenary with a high-visibility restoration effort.

source_title: Wildlife photos reveal nature's vibrant diversity
source_body: A new wildlife photo set highlights species across multiple ecosystems, from birds and wetland life to insects in the wild. The images underline both the beauty of biodiversity and the need for sustained conservation efforts.
target_title: Wildlife Photos Put Global Biodiversity in Focus
target_body: A new set of wildlife photographs is spotlighting species across forests, wetlands and other fragile ecosystems. The images are celebrating biodiversity while reinforcing the case for stronger conservation efforts. The feature turns visual appeal into a clear environmental message.
